# kopsutils_cluster_hash (Data Source)

Computes the kОps cluster name hash: lower(base32hex(fnv32a(SafeClusterName(cluster_name))))[:length], where SafeClusterName replaces '.' with '-'. This is the value kОps appends to truncated names (e.g. service-account account_id).

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Cluster name hash: lower(base32hex(fnv32a(SafeClusterName(cluster_name))))[:length].
data "kopsutils_cluster_hash" "this" {
  cluster_name = "k8s1.tomas-virgl.e2b-test.dev"
}

output "cluster_name_hash" {
  value = data.kopsutils_cluster_hash.this.result # -> g73ca7
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cluster_name` (String) The cluster name (dotted form, e.g. k8s1.example.dev).

### Optional

- `length` (Number) Number of hash characters to keep (kОps uses 6). Defaults to 6.

### Read-Only

- `result` (String) The cluster name hash.
